data.name: S.X.E. Slider: Cyber Sliders
data.detailed_description:
S.X.E. Slider: Cyber Sliders is a fast-food inspired sliding tile puzzle game with a cyberpunk theme.
It features 25 puzzles with varying difficulty and an upbeat soundtrack.

Gameplay:

Slide puzzle pieces in order to complete the image.
Once a puzzle is completed, you can view the full image on the menu.

Features:

  • 25 Beautiful Puzzles
  • Varying Puzzle Difficulty
  • Chill Soundtrack
  • Full Controller Support
  • High Quality Features

data.short_description: A fast-food inspired sliding tile puzzle game featuring 25 gorgeous images with a cyberpunk theme.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8/10/11
  • 處理器: 4+ GHz
  • 記憶體: 1024 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X 9 Compatible GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: 4+ GHz
  • 記憶體: 1024 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X 9 Compatible GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1200 MB 可用空間
